prompt: Create a single 16:9 presentation style preview image showing an entire PPT deck as thumbnails, not an editable PPTX. Each thumbnail should have unique slide composition: KPI dashboard, fishbone cause analysis, matrix table, Gantt timeline, risk heatmap, issue closure board, stakeholder map, process flow. Small but visually coherent. Use glowing lines sparingly, dense information design, polished enterprise presentation, no decorative orbs, no people, no stock images, no actual PPTX file, just a static thumbnail overview image.
